issues.description: DSL is missing the Blocker keyword and the condition that triggers the DON!! return effect. The card has two distinct abilities: (1) Blocker—a static/Counter ability, not represented; (2) [Your Turn] [Once Per Turn] trigger on DON!! card return—requires OnTrigger/OnPlay condition tracking DON!! deck returns, not just Activated. Current DSL only captures a generic GiveDon action without context.
Trigger should be 'OnTrigger' or similar event-based trigger for 'When a DON!! card on your field is returned to your DON!! deck', not 'Activated'. Activated implies manual player action.
Missing condition: [Your Turn] should map to duration or condition. Missing [Once Per Turn] constraint. Missing condition checking that a DON!! was returned to deck.
Blocker keyword ability is completely absent from DSL. Must include a Counter or static block-related effect structure.
